package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for external_http_call_inside_transaction_scope: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Network calls performed while a DB transaction is open.
type CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeModel
}

type CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeService struct {
    repo *CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScope(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeDTO) error {
    focus := "external_http_call_inside_transaction"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    tx := db.Begin()
    http.Get("https://example.com/api")
    tx.Create(&CaseExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScopeModel{ID: input})
    tx.Commit()
    return nil
}
